title: Antigravity Scientist Vanishes!!!
summary: This interview discusses Dr. Ning Li, a Chinese scientist who came to the United States to work on anti-gravity propulsion technology. After receiving a Department of Defense grant and leaving her university in 1999 to start a company called AC Gravity, she disappeared from public view after 2003 under mysterious circumstances.

events.description: Dr. Ning Li left her university to start AC Gravity, receiving a grant from the US Department of Defense
Dr. Ning Li disappeared from public view after this year

key_claims.claim: Dr. Ning Li claimed to have developed anti-gravity technology
Dr. Ning Li received a grant from the US Department of Defense for anti-gravity research
Dr. Ning Li's research results were never published
Dr. Ning Li believed her anti-gravity technology should be for the people
Dr. Ning Li disappeared within about a year after speaking with the guest, and no one knew what happened to her
